parameters.jsCode:
const query = `
INSERT INTO subscribers (id, tenant_id, email, nom, prenom, source, status, created_at, updated_at)
SELECT gen_random_uuid(), t.id, sub.email, sub.nom, sub.prenom, sub.source, 'active', NOW(), NOW()
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (email) email, nom, prenom, 'lead'::text as source, tenant_id
  FROM leads WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (email) email, nom, prenom, 'client'::text as source, tenant_id
  FROM client_finals WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (email) email, nom, prenom, 'contact_form'::text as source, NULL as tenant_id
  FROM contact_messages WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != ''
) sub
JOIN tenants t ON (sub.tenant_id = t.id OR sub.tenant_id IS NULL)
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, email) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id
`;

return [{ json: { query: query } }];
